title: Daily Briefing — Mar 26
headline: Extreme fear, hot volatility, and financials flashing the canary — follow the flows, don't chase the noise.
body: Right, so we've got Fear & Greed at 18.3. We're firmly in the 'Extreme Fear' camp, which, per my rulebook, is an opportunity zone if you know what you're doing. VIX is blowing out at 27.24, up above its 20 MA, so volatility is expanding — but don't panic. The indices (SPY $656.82, QQQ $587.82) are hovering below their 20 MAs: fleeing longs is the play, not fighting trend. Tech is still bleeding, with most of the megacaps trapped under their SMAs — any bounce has been weak.

On rotation, Energy (XLE $60.57), Materials (XLB $49.41), Industrials (XLI $165.10), Staples (XLP $81.51), and Utilities (XLU $45.25) are leading. Financials (XLF $49.34) are lagging badly and sitting below the key 20 MA. That’s your canary in the coal mine — risk stays elevated while XLF refuses to get off the mat. Tech (XLK $136.76), while improving, is still not making any real progress, so don’t get sucked in by dead-cat bounces.

Contrarian time: Extreme fear + high VIX + Financials lagging usually marks late-stage shakeouts, but remember — if bonds (HYG $79.42, LQD $108.73) are breaking down, risk-off rules apply: reduce equity exposure. Retail isn't piling in, so we don’t have bubble FOMO, but the breadth is narrow and momentum is weak. Patience: react, don’t predict. If you missed the energy/materials rotation, abundance mindset — let them come back to mean reversion before jumping in.
callout_body:
SPY $669.33 (20 MA) — below = exit longs
QQQ $599.02 (20 MA) — also below, so stay defensive
XLF $49.85 (20 MA) — lagging, watch for breakdown
XLE $57.31 (20 MA) — leading, but stretched — don’t chase
VIX > 27 — high regime: expect whipsaws
Fear & Greed < 25 — contrarian opportunity, but only if sector setup confirms
action_items: Reduce long exposure to indices and tech — they're stuck under daily 20 MA and VIX is high (rule R006)
Watch XLE, XLB, and XLI for mean reversion buy setups on weekly 20 MA — don't chase, abundance mindset
closing_quote: Less trades = more wins. If it's in the press, it's in the price.
